title: Helsinki, Uusimaa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Helsinki is a city in Uusimaa with a population of 656,000. Finland’s design-forward capital on the Baltic Sea, known for its archipelago, sauna culture, and functionalist architecture.
